2026-05-28JUSNunavut ActOrder Appointing the Hon. Keith D. Yamauchi, to be deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of JusticeOrder Appointing the Honourable Keith D. Yamauchi, a former Justice of the Court of King’s Bench of Alberta, to be a deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice.N/A
subject: Order Appointing the Hon. Keith D. Yamauchi, to be deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice
precis: Order Appointing the Honourable Keith D. Yamauchi, a former Justice of the Court of King’s Bench of Alberta, to be a deputy judge of the Nunavut Court of Justice.
